title: JEO - Extras
description: An Optimization modpack with extras and tweaks for your minecraft cilent.
body:
![Mini header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dad457c68fdf783444ccb06f993f3ffaeacb9cb3.png)

This modpack includes extras for Minecraft to make your expirence better.

Mods just for performance and extras. Check out what we using:

Mods Our mods: - 3D skin layers - AmbientSounds - BetterF3 - Capes - Cloth Conig API - Continuity - CreativeCore - Dynamic FPS - Fabric API - Fabric Laungage Kotlin - Forge Config API port - ImmediatelyFast - Indium - Iris Sheaders - Jade - JEI (Just Enough Items) - Lamb Dynamic Lights - Lithium - Mod Menu - Model Gap Fix - ModernFix - Paxi - Reese's Sodium Options - Sodium - Sodium Extra - Text Placeholder API - Xaero's Minimap - YUNG's API - YUNG's Extras - YetAnother - Your Options Shall Be Respected - Zoomify
Check Out our other modpacks too!
